name: SCP-002
desc: SCP-002 is a fleshy, tumor-like growth with an interior resembling a furnished apartment. Objects placed inside are incorporated into its structure.
containment: SCP-002 must remain connected to a power supply at all times to prevent growth. Personnel entering must be monitored carefully.
reference: Several missing persons are believed to have been absorbed into SCP-002.

name: SCP-003
desc: SCP-003 is a complex organic circuit that grows and adapts when exposed to heat. It forms intricate patterns resembling advanced technology.
containment: SCP-003 must be kept at low temperatures. Exposure to heat must be strictly controlled.
reference: Its structure suggests non-human intelligence and unknown origin.

name: SCP-004
desc: SCP-004 consists of an old wooden door and 12 rusted keys. Only one key opens the door safely, others cause severe dimensional distortion.
containment: All keys must be kept in a secure container. Testing must be approved by senior staff.
reference: Incorrect key usage has resulted in severe injuries and disappearance of personnel.

name: SCP-005
desc: SCP-005 is a key capable of opening any lock, regardless of complexity or design.
containment: SCP-005 must be stored securely and used only for authorized access operations.
reference: No lock has been found that SCP-005 cannot open.

name: SCP-006
desc: SCP-006 is a small spring of water that has powerful healing properties, including reversing aging and curing diseases.
containment: Access is highly restricted. Water samples must be controlled and stored securely.
reference: Overexposure may cause dangerous biological effects.
